instructions: Write one bilingual draft (en+ko, draft:true) with contentProfile:head-to-head. Writing mode: benchmark. Tone: case-study. Follow docs/templates/head-to-head.md and docs/CONTENT_STANDARDS.md. Season priority: summer; active events: 여름·방학, 폭염·냉방. Use the benchmark outline in this request (outline-first). Paraphrase all sections; never copy SERP text. Publish-ready before complete: description 50–160 chars (en+ko), "## FAQ" / "## 자주 묻는 질문" with ≥3 ### Q&A pairs (profile minimum), coverImage on disk, profile template sections. Cover: never copy another post cover. If no local PEXELS/PIXABAY keys, omit coverImage, push, let GHA "Fetch missing draft covers" run (repo Secrets), then git pull. Draft frontmatter: set createdAt to now; date = today KST (publish overwrites at go-live) — never future date on buffer drafts. Run `npm run content:integrity:repair` (or `node scripts/check-integrity.mjs {slug} --draft --repair`) — must pass with zero errors. Do NOT use `npm run content:validate` alone (published posts only). Then set status to complete.
note: Publish unblock (no-publish-eligible-drafts): product topic required — buffer may exceed 2 until slot clears
